security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-src http: https: about:

bundle.shortDescription: Lightweight tmux-style terminal multiplexer for Windows
bundle.longDescription: ymux is a tmux-inspired terminal multiplexer for Windows. It supports persistent split layouts, per-pane working directories and startup commands, a shell picker (cmd / PowerShell / pwsh / Git Bash / WSL), and numbered workspaces each with their own saved layout.
